title: After Tariff Relief, Belgian Firm Gifts Trump Ring With 321 Diamonds, 6 Rubies
summary_full: The gift comes months after Belgium's diamond industry won the removal of US tariffs on diamond imports.
summary_public: The gift comes months after Belgium's diamond industry won the removal of US tariffs on diamond imports.
